description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Dev that runs on workflow dispatch, push to master (excluding tags starting with v), and pull requests to master. The workflow builds and packages DeFiChain for multiple platforms (linux-x64, linux-armhf, win-x64, mac-x64) using a matrix strategy, and uploads the artifacts to GitHub. For linux-x64, it also builds and pushes Docker images to Docker Hub.
